meta.name: 肃穆悼念
meta.description: 石板灰色调，衬线字体传递庄重感，居中标题搭配细线框营造仪式感，首行缩进呈现文学排版质感，适合悼念、纪念、严肃话题

styles.container: max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 10px; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.8 !important; word-wrap: break-word; color: #3a3a3a;
styles.h1: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #3a3a3a !important; margin-top: 48px !important; margin-bottom: 32px !important; line-height: 1.35em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-align: center; padding: 20px 16px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.25); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.25); font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.h2: font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #4a5568 !important; margin-top: 44px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; line-height: 1.35em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-align: center; padding-bottom: 14px; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(90,99,116,0.35), rgba(90,99,116,0.35)); background-size: 32px 1px; background-position: center bottom; background-repeat: no-repeat; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.h3: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #4a5568 !important; margin-top: 36px !important; margin-bottom: 16px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-align: center; padding-bottom: 10px; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(90,99,116,0.25), rgba(90,99,116,0.25)); background-size: 20px 1px; background-position: center bottom; background-repeat: no-repeat; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.h4: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #5a6374 !important; margin-top: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 12px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-align: center; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.h5: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #5a6374 !important; margin-top: 24px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; text-align: center; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.h6: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #5a6374 !important; margin-top: 20px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; text-align: center; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.p: margin: 5px 0 24px !important; line-height: 1.8em !important; text-align: start !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: #3a3a3a !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-indent: 2em; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.strong: font-weight: 600; color: #4a5568 !important; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.em: font-style: italic; color: #5a6374 !important; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.strike: text-decoration: line-through; color: #8a8a8a !important; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.u: text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(90,99,116,0.3); text-underline-offset: 3px; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.a: color: #5a6374 !important; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.25); padding-bottom: 1px; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.ul: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 22px; list-style-type: disc; color: rgba(90,99,116,0.5); font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.ol: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 22px; list-style-type: decimal; color: rgba(90,99,116,0.5); font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.li: margin: 6px 0; line-height: 1.8 !important; text-indent: 0; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.liText: color: #3a3a3a; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.taskList: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 8px; list-style: none; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.taskListItem: line-height: 1.8 !important; list-style: none; text-indent: 0; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.taskListItemCheckbox: margin-right: 10px; width: 16px; height: 16px; vertical-align: middle; cursor: pointer; accent-color: #5a6374;
styles.blockquote: margin: 20px 24px; padding: 18px 20px 2px 20px !important; border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.15); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.15); background-color: rgba(90,99,116,0.03) !important; color: #5a6374 !important; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8 !important; text-align: center; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; padding: 2px 5px; background-color: rgba(90,99,116,0.07) !important; border-radius: 2px;
styles.pre: margin: 28px 0; padding: 18px; background-color: rgba(90,99,116,0.04) !important; border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; line-height: 1.6 !important; border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.12); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.12);
styles.hr: margin: 3rem auto; border: none; height: 0; width: 100%; text-align: center; border-bottom: none; background: transparent; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, transparent 42%, rgba(90,99,116,0.3) 42%, rgba(90,99,116,0.3) 46%, transparent 46%, transparent 48%, rgba(90,99,116,0.3) 48%, rgba(90,99,116,0.3) 52%, transparent 52%, transparent 54%, rgba(90,99,116,0.3) 54%, rgba(90,99,116,0.3) 58%, transparent 58%); background-size: 100% 1px; background-position: center; background-repeat: no-repeat;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; max-height: 600px !important; height: auto; display: block; margin: 36px auto; opacity: 0.92;
styles.table: min-width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 15px; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.th: padding: 12px 16px; text-align: center; border-top: 2px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.25); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.15); font-weight: 600; color: #4a5568 !important; word-break: keep-all; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.td: padding: 12px 16px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.1); color: #3a3a3a !important; word-break: keep-all; font-family: Optima-Regular, Optima, PingFangSC-light, PingFangTC-light, "PingFang SC", Cambria, Cochin, Georgia, Times, "Times New Roman", serif;
styles.codeBlockPre: background-color: #f5f5f6; padding: 0; border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 28px 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.12); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,99,116,0.12);
styles.codeBlockCode: color: #3a3a3a; font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; display: block; white-space: pre; padding: 18px;
